memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Egerton, Edgeton, Edgerton and others. First found in Cheshire where they were seated from very ancient times, some say well before the Norman Conquest and the arrival of Duke William at Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: Eleanor Egerton who settled in the Barbados in 1691; John Egerton settled in Virginia in 1726. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). Motto Translated: I trust in virtue not arms This unusual name is of Anglo-Saxon origin, and is a locational surname, found as Egerton or Eggerton, that derives from either of the places called Egerton in the counties of Cheshire and Kent. The former is recorded in 1260 as "Eggerton", and the latter appears in the Domesday Book of 1086 as "Eardingtun", and in 1206 as "Ediardinton". The Cheshire place name means "Ecgheres or Ecgheard's settlement", derived from the Old English pre- 7th Century personal names "Ecghere" or "Ecgheard", with the suffix "-tun", meaning an enclosure or settlement. The Egerton in Kent derives from "Ecgheard", as above, with the Old English suffix "ing", meaning "people or family of" and "tun" as above, the place name therefore meaning "the settlement of Ecgheard's people". Locational surnames, such as this, were usually acquired by a local landowner, or by the lord of the manor, and especially by those former inhabitants of a place who had moved to another area, and were thereafter best identified by the name of their birthplace. An early settler in the New World Colonies was William Egerton, who left London on board the "Amitie" in October 1635, bound for St. Christopher's in the Barbados. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of David Eggerton (witness), which was dated 1282, witness in the "Assize Court Rolls of Cheshire", during the reign of King Edward 1st, known as "The Hammer of the Scots", 1272 - 1307. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.Of, Betley, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝特利
zh.St Margaret Churchyard, Betley, Newcastl: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill於1398年出生在英國斯塔福爾萊內爾時，他的父親William de Egerton26歲，母親Ellin Haukeston25歲。他於大約1414年與Elizabeth Mainwaring在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年11月1日在英國享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill于1398年出生在英国斯塔福爾萊內爾时，他的父亲William de Egerton26岁，母亲Ellin Haukeston25岁。他于大约1414年与Elizabeth Mainwaring在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年11月1日在英国享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝特利。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill was born in 1398, in Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England, his father, William de Egerton, was 26 and his mother, Ellin Haukeston, was 25. He married Elizabeth Mainwaring about 1414, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 1 November 1452, in England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Betley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill est né en 1398, à Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William d’Egerton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellin Haukeston, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mainwaring environ 1414, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1452, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Betley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill 1398 in Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Egerton 26 und seine Mutter Ellin Haukeston 25. Er hat um 1414 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 1. November 1452 im Alter von 54 Jahren in England und wurde in Betley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill è nato il nel 1398 nel Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Egerton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ellin Haukeston, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mainwaring circa 1414, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1452, nel England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Betley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Egerton of Wrinchillが1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウリンエヒルで生まれた時，父William de Egertonは26歳，母Ellin Haukestonは25歳であった。約1414年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年11月1日にイギリスで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill(이)가 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르 라이인힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Egerton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellin Haukeston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1414년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 11월 1일 영국에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill nasceu em 1398, em Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Egerton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ellin Haukeston, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mainwaring aproximadamente 1414, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1452, em Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Betley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill родился в 1398 г. в местности раинэилл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Egerton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellin Haukeston, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mainwaring около 1414 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 1 ноября 1452 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности бетли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill nació en 1398, en Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Egerton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ellin Haukeston, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mainwaring aproximadamente 1414, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1452, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Betley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
